title: Aagaasa Veedu Kattum Lyrics Tamil (Dear Comrade)
stanzas:
aagaasa veedu kattum
un kannile
chinoondu koodukatta
vandhen.

sangeetha pathangalin
perosaiyil sokki
unnodu vaasal varai
vandhen.

men aambal punnaigaiyin
peranbile
vinmeenil veededuppen
indre

unnai kaanave ye..
aasai ovvondrum
otrai kaalil nindrengum
adharkkaagave ye..
vaasal padiyoram
endhan vazhkai kudiyerum

evarum kaangala
ivan padum avadhi
idhayath thudippil
alaigalin surudhi

vizhigal malarvathai
rasithida virumbi
urakkam poividum
veettukku thirumbi

aagaasa veedu kattum
un kannile..
sangeetha pathangalin
perosaiyil sokki
..
tamilStanzas:
ஆகாச வீடு கட்டும்
உன் கண்ணிலே
சின்னூண்டு கூடுகட்ட
வந்தேன்.

சங்கீத பாதங்களின்
பேரோசையில் சொக்கி
உன்னோடு வாசல் வரை
வந்தேன்.

மென் ஆம்பல் புன்னைகையின்
பேரன்பிளே
விண்மீனில் வீடெடுப்பேன்
இன்றே

உன்னை காணவே எ..
ஆசை ஒவ்வொன்றும்
ஒற்றை காலில் நின்றெங்கும்
அதற்காகவே எ..
வாசல் படியோரம்
எந்தன் வழக்கை குடியேறும்

எவரும் கான்கள
இவன் படும் அவதி
இதயத் துடிப்பில்
அலைகளின் சுருதி

விழிகள் மலர்வதை
ரசித்திட விரும்பி
உறக்கம் போய்விடும்
வீட்டுக்கு திரும்பி

ஆகாச வீடு கட்டும்
உன் கண்ணில்..
சங்கீத பாதங்களின்
பேராசையில் சொக்கி

seo.title: Aagaasa Veedu Kattum Lyrics Tamil (Dear Comrade)
seo.description: Full Aagaasa Veedu Kattum songs lyrics in tamil (ஆகாச வீடு கட்டும் உன் கண்ணிலே ...) Dear Comrade Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Karthik Netha, Music: Justin Prabhakaran, Singer(s): Gowtham Bharadwaj.
seo.keywords: Karthik Netha, Dear Comrade, Justin Prabhakaran, Gowtham Bharadwaj, Aagaasa Veedu Kattum full lyrics, Dear Comrade songs lyrics, Aagaasa Veedu Kattum lyrics snippets, Aagaasa Veedu Kattum WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Aagaasa Veedu Kattum lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the heartfelt emotions of Aagaasa Veedu Kattum, a soul-stirring melody from the movie Dear Comrade. Composed by Justin Prabhakaran and beautifully sung by Gowtham Bharadwaj, this song captures the essence of love and longing. Dive into this musical masterpiece that resonates with the tender moments of life.
stanzaMeanings: I have come to gather the light from your eyes, like a house built in the sky.
I have come to your doorstep, lost in the sound of musical gatherings.
In the embrace of the beautiful girl, I will find my place in the sky.
To see you, my desire stands firm, and for that, my life is a journey to your door.
No one can see him, but he sings, and the waves of emotions rise in the heart.
To enjoy the blooming of eyes, I long to return home, where dreams fade away.
I have come to gather the light from your eyes, lost in the sound of musical gatherings.
enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Aagaasa Veedu Kattum?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, portraying the feelings of the protagonist towards their beloved.

What is the plot context of Dear Comrade?

Dear Comrade revolves around the struggles of a young man and his journey of love, self-discovery, and overcoming obstacles in relationships.

Who is the singer of Aagaasa Veedu Kattum?

The song is sung by Gowtham Bharadwaj, known for his soulful renditions.

Who composed the music for Dear Comrade?

The music for Dear Comrade was composed by Justin Prabhakaran, who is praised for his captivating melodies.

When was Aagaasa Veedu Kattum released?

The song was released on April 8, 2019, as part of the movie's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the song Aagaasa Veedu Kattum from the movie Dear Comrade, Vijay Deverakonda and Rashmika Mandanna's characters experience a deep emotional connection. The song beautifully conveys the themes of love and longing, set against a backdrop of soothing melodies. It evokes feelings of nostalgia and romance, making it a perfect fit for intimate moments. Released in 2019, this track resonates with anyone who has experienced the highs and lows of love.
